meaning: n.鎵撴补璇椾汉,鍔ｇ瓑璇椾汉
examples: But if a daub of a painter, or a poetaster, soothe themselves by the conceit that their head is full of high ideas, their consolation is a poor one;
Not animal, but not quite human either, they feed fear and imagination in equal quantity. Nor are such creatures merely the province of the past and the poetaster
